mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, username, password, name, gender, id_card_number, phone_number, email, address, date_of_birth, is_verified, created_at, updated_at, role_id FROM users
role_id = #{roleId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
order by role_id desc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.name, u.gender, u.id_card_number AS idCardNumber, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, u.email, u.address, u.date_of_birth AS dateOfBirth, u.is_verified AS isVerified, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.updated_at AS updatedAt, lp.course_name AS courseName, lp.completed_hours AS completedHours, lp.total_hours AS totalHours FROM users u INNER JOIN registrations r ON u.user_id = r.user_id INNER JOIN student_instructor_assignments i ON r.registration_id = i.registration_id INNER JOIN learning_progress lp ON r.registration_id = lp.registration_id WHERE i.instructor_id = #{instructorId} AND i.status = 2
AND (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.id_card_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
